description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a futuristic, urban-inspired outfit. The person wears a fitted tunic with an asymmetrical hem, accented by a high collar and a belt at the waist. The clothing features bold, angular paneling and a mix of smooth and matte textures, giving a modern, almost sci-fi appearance. The figure's arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are clad in tight pants with geometric detailing. The footwear is chunky and high-ankled, complementing the overall streamlined look. The hairstyle is short and swept to one side, adding to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a modern, angular outfit with a high-collared tunic, tight pants, and chunky high-ankle footwear. The figure has a short, side-swept hairstyle and a futuristic urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared tunic, belt, and geometric paneling, with arms outstretched and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the asymmetrical hem of the tunic, the profile of the high collar, and the side-swept hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tunic, the belt, and the back of the hairstyle, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tunic's side profile and the hairstyle's sweep.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted tunic with high collar and belt, tight pants, and high-ankle footwear in a modern, angular style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms outstretched horizontally
